title: Date-Night Cultured Uruguayan Teque Os Wrap
description: A romantic and exotic version of a classic Uruguayan dish, featuring cultured and aerated teque os, served in a crispy ssam-wrap.

ingredients.name: Teque Os
ingredients.notes: Purchased pre-fried from a local Latin American market.

ingredients.name: Shredded Beef
ingredients.notes: Cured and cooked at home or store-bought.

ingredients.name: Ssam-Style Wrap
ingredients.notes: Thawed and cut into single servings.

instructions: Butter a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the teque os and cook until golden brown, about 3 minutes per side.
Transfer the teque os to a plate and top each piece with a spoonful of chimichurri, a dollop of cultured yogurt, and a sprinkle of mashed plantains.
Add the shredded beef to the skillet and cook until warmed through.
Warm the ssam-style wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by placing a few pieces of teque os in the center of each wrap, followed by a spoonful of the beef mixture and a sprinkle of red onion and cilantro.
